statement: agent-enterprise's residual novelty is not any individual primitive (all of which exist) but the unified build-time resolution pipeline that combines artefact injection-linting + trust-labelling/quarantine + checksums + SBOM + dep-scan with a fail-closed gate over multi-platform agent deploy artefacts.

evidence.quote: The article mentions a Security Verified badge as a transparency signal but does not describe checksums, quarantine systems, or granular trust labeling mechanisms beyond this visual indicator.
Built-in Tool Pinning... verifying integrity of installed tools by tracking changes via tool hashing.

falsifier: If a single shipped tool already bundles artefact injection-lint + quarantine + checksum + SBOM + dep-scan as one fail-closed build pipeline for agent artefacts, this residual novelty disappears.
